content: Drug-susceptible pulmonary TB: intensive phase 2 months with RIPE (rifampin, isoniazid, pyrazinamide, ethambutol) daily; continuation phase 4 months with RI daily. Alternative 4-month regimen: rifapentine-moxifloxacin-based (CDC TBTC Study 31/A5349). LTBI treatment options: 3HP (isoniazid+rifapentine weekly x3 months), 4R (rifampin daily x4 months), 3HR (isoniazid+rifampin daily x3 months), or 6-9H (isoniazin monotherapy). MDR-TB: all-oral regimens preferred including bedaquiline, linezolid, fluoroquinolone, clofazimine, cycloserine; duration 6-20 months depending on regimen. Newer 6-month BPaLM regimen (bedaquiline, pretomanid, linezolid, moxifloxacin) for MDR/Pre-XDR-TB. Directly observed therapy (DOT) recommended for adherence.
